name: AWS EventBridge Cross Account Target Has Been Set
description: Detects the creation or update of an AWS EventBridge rule target that sets a cross-account event bus as a destination, which might indicate an attacker trying to perform reconnaissance on the events, exfiltration to attacker controlled account or lateral movement to other victim AWS accounts

rules.name: AWS EventBridge Cross Account Target Has Been Set

author: Yash Verma & Christopher Ordonez
